creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 202283
svn-diff-gmusicbrowser-1.1.15

> Add gettext cause of portlint 

Portlint is wrong for suggesting this here.  It's already covered by
the devel/p5-Locale-gettext dependency.  If you insist on adding USES=gettext,
add NLS_USES=gettext instead.
